articles.author: Terri Cullen
articles.title: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay
articles.description: President Trump claimed ICE agents handling airport security would arrest immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally.
articles.content: U.S. President Donald Trump on Saturday threatened to send federal immigration agents to U.S. airports unless congressional Democrats immediately agree to fund the Department of Homeland Security.

articles.author: Jason Ma
articles.title: OpenAI cofounder says he hasn’t written a line of code in months and is in a ‘state of psychosis’ trying to figure out what’s possible
articles.description: "I don't think a normal person actually realizes that this happened or how dramatic it was."
articles.content: Andrej Karpathy, an OpenAI cofounder and former director of AI at Tesla, admitted that hes not on the forefront of the field and feels nervous about it...

articles.author: Jo Borrás
articles.title: Auto(nomous)bots, roll(er) out! The $1.75 BILLION future of self driving asphalt
articles.description: Autonomous construction tech startup Bedrock Robotics has just closed on a $270 million Series B funding round that brings total investment in the self-driving roller and excavator firm to more than $350 million.

articles.author: Jo Borrás
articles.title: Vermont utility makes it easier than ever to add a home backup battery
articles.description: Vermont utility Green Mountain Power is expanding one of the country’s most exciting virtual power plant programs, adding a new battery lease program to its menu of home energy offerings.

articles.author: Harold Hutchison
articles.title: Elon Musk Offers To Pay Salaries Of TSA Agents Working Through Government Shutdown
articles.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk volunteered Saturday to pay the salaries of TSA workers who have missed paychecks since the government partially shut down in February.
articles.content: Tesla CEO Elon Musk volunteered Saturday to pay the salaries of federal airport security workers who have missed multiple paychecks...
